title: Create & Craft
description: Custom create-based modpack created for me & some friends to run on an SMP server.
body:
# Create & Craft
Create & Craft is a modpack I made to play on an SMP with some friends.

The main focus is on [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) & some of its addons, but I've also included [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism), new worldgen (with [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith) and [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic)), some performance improving mods (including [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)), and a bunch of QoL improvements.

No recipe changes, no quests, just good stuff.

## Mod List

## Resource Packs
- [Sparkles](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sparkles): Official custom textures for incendium & nullscape mods.
- [Sparkles Addon - Alpha Islands](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sparkles-addon-alpha-islands): Optional custom textures for the rare alpha islands biome.

## Shader Packs
- [BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders): Good looking shaders made by Capt Tatsu.
- [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)*: Detailed shader pack, more in line with minecraft's style.
- [Complementary Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound)*: Detailed shader pack, with less blockiness and more realism.
- [MakeUp Ultra Fast](https://modrinth.com/shader/makeup-ultra-fast-shaders): Performance focused shaders that also look good.

\* Any issues that arise due to using these shader packs with this modpack should be taken up with this modpack, not the shader pack's author.
